title: Televisiophobia
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/691cf7c83488230f5c529e9f56930052cbfe79c1.png)

## Adds PHEN-228 (The Boiled One) Into the Game as a Dangerous Mob
Trying Not to Be The Standard "Dweller"

Televisiophobia adds 1 New Mob, A New Structure, and a New Interactible Block. As you Explore your world you may find an Abandoned Villager Home, which is not connected to a village. You will find a Strange TV inside the Home.

<details>
<summary>Spoilers</summary>
When you interact with the TV, you will hear PHEN-228 Speak, for around 30 seconds. Then after it's over, the TV will change and you will get the Omen effect for 4 minutes. It can not be cured by milk. After the Omen Effect ends, a chase sequence will begin, and PHEN-228 will chase you Extremely Fast, however, the player also gets a large speed boost to survive the chase, After the chase PHEN-228 will suddenly disappear, and the player will be safe.


</details>
